backend.changelog: Output panel polish + Excel export fixes: clear 'CAD Bridge offline' badge, a stale-export warning on drawings, the rarely-needed 'Force regenerate' option is now hidden by default (enable it in Settings - Funkcije), Excel column headers now match the Columns picker exactly, and DXF hyperlinks only appear when a DXF actually exists.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
